title: Dense Romantic Malaysian Durian Bubur
description: A rich and creamy Malaysian dessert bursting with the unique flavor of durian, perfect for a romantic evening.
instructions: In a small saucepan, combine water and grated ginger. Heat over medium heat until the mixture simmers.
Add rice flour and whisk continuously to prevent lumps.
Gradually add durian puree and salted pandan extract. Whisk until smooth.
Add coconut milk and whisk until well combined.
Remove from heat and stir in palm sugar and coconut oil until dissolved.
Return the saucepan to medium heat and cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and forms a custard-like consistency.
Remove from heat and stir in fresh mint leaves and pink food colouring.
Deglaze the saucepan with 1-2 tablespoons of coconut oil to prevent sticking.
Pour the bubur into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours or until set.
Serve cold, garnished with additional mint leaves if desired.
